name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (3.0L V6 petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M272 3.0L V6: Mercedes EU plans commonly 15,000 km or 12 months; rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy for M272 E 300).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 petrol Tier 2 proxy).
serviceNotes.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months (long-life coolant distance + 5-year time cap; auto-abc v7610/v7614 have no W212 V6/V8 table).
serviceNotes.transfer case oil: 4MATIC only if offered on this variant; ~60,000 km preventive.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: 120,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 petrol Tier 2 serpentine belt).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Primarily port-injection V6; intake cleaning rarely needed unless symptoms.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy for M272 E 300 fixed schedule)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W212 maintenance plan; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W212 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months: Mercedes long-life coolant for W212 V6 petrol (https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7610-2009/service has no interval table for E 350 W212)
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil ~100,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Changed REC to 120,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (serpentine belt)
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Port-injection M272 — carbon cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
